visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man with short black hair, wearing glasses and a grey flat cap, sits in the driver's seat of a car. He is dressed in a white t-shirt and has several beaded bracelets on his right wrist. He speaks directly to the camera with an animated expression. (2) The scene cuts to a close-up of a silver smartphone with a clear protective case featuring a white MagSafe ring. The phone is placed against a textured background. (3) The man holds the clear-cased phone up to the camera, tilting it to show the transparency and the 'JOWUA' logo at the bottom. The lighting is bright and natural, coming from the car windows. (4) A different phone case is shown, this one is a dark, matte grey with a metallic ring that folds out as a kickstand. The camera zooms in on the hinge mechanism. (5) The man demonstrates a car mount accessory. He attaches a phone to a circular magnetic mount with a rose gold trim that is fixed to the car's dashboard. (6) The view shifts to the back seat of the car, where a phone is attached to a headrest mount. The screen of the phone shows a high-speed racing video. (7) Returning to the front seat, the man continues his presentation, gesturing with his hands to emphasize points while holding the different phone cases.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: 3c有意思tim哥. [Logo]: @3ctim. [Subtitle]: 身為電動車車主. (2) [Variety]: #閃亮登場. [Variety]: Jowua. [Subtitle]: 你一定要知道的配件品牌就是他啦. (3) [Subtitle]: 專做電動車相關配件. (4) [Subtitle]: 不只車用配件, 現在連手機殼都做的超強. (5) [Variety]: #質感滿分. (6) [Variety]: #低調成穩. (7) [Variety]: #手感很舒服. (8) [Variety]: #裸機感滿滿. (9) [Variety]: #非常重要. (10) [Subtitle]: 重點是喔, 還給你4年泛黃免費換修保固. (11) [Variety]: #註冊享4年超長保固. (12) [Variety]: #實用性滿分. (13) [Variety]: #最新. (14) [Subtitle]: 一邊充電, 一邊降溫, 手機充滿電也不燙手. (15) [Variety]: #高級享受. (16) [Variety]: #iPhone 13-15 老客戶限定.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator presenting product features.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged man wearing glasses, a grey flat cap, a white t-shirt, and beaded bracelets.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The primary setting is the interior of a modern car with black leather seats. Background views through the windows show urban greenery and buildings. Some shots focus on close-ups of tech accessories against neutral backgrounds.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with an energetic male voice speaking in Mandarin Chinese. He has a high level of vocal arousal and enthusiasm. A mid-tempo electronic pop BGM starts immediately with a clear rhythmic beat. (2) A sharp 'click' sound effect is heard as a phone is shown being placed into a case. The speaker continues at a fast pace. (3) A 'whoosh' transition sound occurs during a visual scene change to the car interior. The BGM maintains a steady, positive energy. (4) A mechanical 'click' and 'snap' are audible as the kickstand on a phone case is opened and closed. (5) A rhythmic 'ding' SFX accompanies the appearance of key promotional text overlays. The speaker's pitch remains high and engaging. (6) The sound of a phone magnetically snapping onto a mount is heard, followed by a soft electronic chime indicating charging start. (7) The speaker concludes with a final enthusiastic call to action, and the BGM fades out with a sustained synth chord.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Brand Introduction -> Feature Showcase (Phone Cases) -> Car Accessory Showcase -> Warranty/Promo Info -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote JOWUA brand smartphone and car accessories, specifically targeting electric vehicle owners by highlighting product features like transparency, durability, and practical car integration.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct presentation and verbal praise of the brand 'JOWUA', including product demonstrations and warranty information.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video is a high-energy tech review typical of social media creators, using fast cuts and dense text overlays to maintain engagement.
